WHO WE ARE

A Christ-Centered School Built for Every Child

Upper Klinan SDA School Inc. is an Adventist institution committed to providing quality, holistic education in the heart of Upper Klinan, Polomolok, South Cotabato. We nurture the mind, body, and spirit of every child.

As part of the global Adventist Education network — guided by the vision "A Path to Jesus · A Journey to Excellence" — we prepare students not just academically, but for life and eternity.

🎓 Matatag Curriculum  |  Adventist Values
Our Mission, Vision & Philosophy
The guiding principles that shape every child's journey at UKSDA
🕊️

Vision

Inspired by our Seventh-day Adventist faith, Upper Klinan SDA School Inc. envisions to generate effective learners with a Christ-like character.

🎯

Mission

Upper Klinan SDA School Inc. provides a Christ-centered education which harmoniously develops the physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual aspects of the learners and prepares them for the service of the world and in the world to come.

📖

Philosophy

Upper Klinan SDA School Inc. believes that God is the source of true education. Hence, the learners have their own potentials which can be enriched by the Adventist institution with the help of the Lord.

Enrollment Information
S.Y. 2026–2027 — Enrollment is Now Open!
🏫

Enrollment Must Be Done In Person

⚠️ Parents / Guardians are REQUIRED to personally come to the school to complete enrollment. No enrollment will be processed without an in-person visit. Please bring all required documents and be prepared to settle fees upon arrival.

📍 PRK. Mabinuligon, Upper Klinan, Polomolok, South Cotabato

📋 Requirements Checklist

  • Original Report Card / Form 138 (previous school year)
  • PSA Birth Certificate (original or certified true copy)
  • 1×1 or 2×2 recent ID photo
  • Baptismal / Dedication Certificate (optional but preferred)
  • For transferees: Certificate of Transfer / Good Moral Character

📄 STATEMENT OF FEES

Miscellaneous Fees₱ 2,750.00
Modules₱ 500.00
Books (tentative)TBA
HASFA₱ 350.00
Tuition Fees (₱ 650.00 / month × 10)₱ 6,500.00

Entrance Fee (to be paid upon enrollment):₱ 2,000.00

⚠️ Reservation Fee of ₱ 500.00 will be deducted on Miscellaneous Fees but is NON-REFUNDABLE.

🏷️ DISCOUNTS

Full Payment upon Enrollment10% on Tuition Fees
SDA10% on Tuition Fees
Siblings1st – 25%  |  2nd & beyond – 50%
Recruitment10% on Tuition Fees per recruitment

⚠️ POLICY ON WITHDRAWAL

When Withdrawal OccursAmount Withheld
Before classes start10%
1 week after classes start50%
1 month after classes start
(required to pay whole year fees)		NON-REFUNDABLE

📂 Submission of Requirements & Important Notes

Please bring your original and photocopied documents personally to the school office during office hours:

📅 Monday – Thursday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
📅 Friday: 8:00 AM – 11:00 AM only

Required documents: Report Card / Form 138, PSA Birth Certificate, 1×1 or 2×2 ID Photo, and Certificate of Transfer (for transferees).

💰 Initial Fee / Down Payment: Parents / Guardians must visit the school office before class begins to negotiate and settle the initial fee or down payment. Our staff will be glad to discuss payment arrangements that work for your family.

🎓 Scholarship: Whether you are applying for a scholarship or not, please inquire at the office for eligibility, availability, and requirements. Our staff will be happy to assist you.

✉️ Enroll Now — Send Us an Email

Clicking Enroll Now will open your device's email app with a pre-filled message.
